prompt: A single-leaf garden gate mounted between two square posts. A rectangular outer frame carries vertical pickets and a diagonal brace, with the leaf supported from one post by two strap hinges and closed against a latch post. Two revolute joints at the hinge barrels share a vertical axis and allow the gate to swing about 100 degrees.
label: Garden Gate Strap

prompt: A double-leaf driveway-style garden gate with two framed leaves that meet at the center. Each leaf has a rectangular perimeter frame, sparse horizontal rails, and its own hinge set mounted to a side post. Each leaf rotates on a vertical revolute hinge axis with about 120 degrees of travel so the pair can open outward.
label: Garden Gate Double

prompt: A pair of rectangular eyeglasses. A front frame with two lens rims and a bridge carries two slender temple arms attached near the outer corners. Each temple folds on a revolute hinge with a roughly 0 to 100 degree range relative to the front frame.
label: Glasses Rectangular

prompt: A pair of round metal glasses with thin wire rims and slightly curved temple arms. The nose bridge and two nose-pad brackets support the front, while each temple arm connects through a compact hinge block at the frame edge. The two temple hinges are revolute joints about vertical-ish hinge pins and fold inward about 90 degrees.
label: Glasses Round

prompt: A desktop world globe on a tilted meridian ring and round base. The spherical globe is held between two polar pivots inside the meridian, and the meridian is supported by a yoke rising from the base. The globe spins continuously on its polar revolute axis, and the meridian tilts on a second revolute axis through the side supports by about +/-30 degrees.
label: Globe Desktop

prompt: A classroom globe stand with a full circular meridian and a broad pedestal base. The sphere mounts on top and bottom trunnions inside the ring, and the ring is carried by a forked support from the base. The sphere rotates continuously about its north-south axis, while the meridian rotates about a horizontal side axis about +/-45 degrees.
label: Globe Pedestal

prompt: An automotive glove compartment door integrated into a simple dashboard opening. A shallow bin sits behind the opening, and a rectangular front door with a handle is hinged along its lower edge to the housing. One revolute joint along the bottom edge lets the door swing downward about 90 degrees.
label: Glove Door Drop

prompt: A passenger-side glove box with a curved outer door panel and inner storage tub. The tub is fixed inside a dashboard face, and the door is supported by side hinge arms near the lower corners. The door opens on a lower-edge revolute axis with about 70 degrees of travel.
label: Glove Door Curved

prompt: A dual-slot desktop graphics card. A long rectangular PCB carries a shrouded heatsink and two axial cooling fans on the front face, with a bracket plate at one end. Each fan is mounted in its own circular frame and spins continuously on a central revolute axis normal to the card face.
label: GPU Dual Fan

prompt: A large triple-fan graphics card with a rigid backplate and angled outer shroud. The card body is a flat PCB and heatsink slab, with three circular fan openings evenly spaced along the length and an I/O bracket at one short end. Each of the three fan rotors rotates continuously about its own axial revolute joint.
label: GPU Triple Fan

prompt: A kettle-style charcoal grill on a small wheeled stand. A round lower fire bowl supports a domed lid, and the bowl sits in a simple tubular frame with two wheels and a front foot. The lid opens on a rear revolute hinge axis by about 100 degrees, and the two wheels spin continuously on a shared axle.
label: Grill Kettle

prompt: A barrel-style outdoor grill with a horizontal cooking chamber and a side shelf. The lower half of the barrel is fixed to a cart frame, and the upper half acts as the lid with a handle along the front edge. The lid rotates upward on a rear longitudinal revolute axis about 95 degrees, and the cart wheels rotate continuously on their axle.
label: Grill Barrel

prompt: A standard upright hand truck. A tubular frame rises from a flat toe plate, with two large wheels mounted on an axle at the lower rear corners and loop handles at the top. Each wheel spins continuously on the axle, while the frame itself stays rigid.
label: Hand Truck Upright

prompt: A convertible hand truck with a fold-out secondary toe section. The main tubular frame carries two large rear wheels and a primary nose plate, while a hinged extension plate nests under the main plate. The two wheels rotate continuously on the axle, and the extension plate folds on a revolute joint under the main toe plate through about 180 degrees.
label: Hand Truck Convertible

prompt: A top-hinged awning window in a rectangular frame. A glazed sash sits inside the outer frame and is supported from the top edge by two compact hinges. The sash rotates outward on a horizontal upper revolute axis by about 60 degrees.
label: Hatch Awning

prompt: A marine deck hatch with a thick rectangular frame and a slightly raised lid. The lid overlaps the fixed curb frame and has side latch blocks near the front corners. A rear-edge revolute hinge axis lets the lid lift about 75 degrees.
label: Hatch Marine

prompt: A small wall cabinet with two side-hinged doors. A rectangular box body has a top, bottom, two sides, and a central shelf, with each front door mounted to an outer side panel. Each door rotates on a vertical revolute hinge axis about 110 degrees.
label: Cabinet Double Door

prompt: A tall utility cabinet with a single full-height door and simple feet. The carcass is a rectangular enclosure with interior shelves, and the door panel is attached to one side wall through two exposed hinges. One vertical revolute joint lets the door swing open about 120 degrees.
label: Cabinet Single Door

prompt: A hard-shell violin case with a clamshell body. A shallow lower shell holds the instrument cavity, and a matching upper shell forms the lid with a carry handle on the front edge. The lid is attached along the long rear edge by a revolute hinge axis and opens about 95 degrees.
label: Instrument Case Violin

prompt: A rectangular hard equipment case for a compact instrument. The base shell has rounded corners and a flat front face with latches, and the top shell is hinged at the back. One rear revolute joint lets the lid open about 100 degrees.
label: Instrument Case Rect

prompt: A desktop Wi-Fi router with four external antennas. A low rectangular housing carries four identical antenna stalks mounted at the rear corners and near the centerline, with small feet under the base. Each antenna attaches through a single revolute hinge at its root and can tilt in a vertical plane through about 120 degrees.
label: Router Four Antenna

prompt: A flat home router with two fold-out paddle antennas on the back edge. The main body is a rounded rectangular slab with venting on top, and each antenna is a thin panel on a short pivot base. The two antennas rotate about horizontal root hinges from folded-flat to upright over about 100 degrees.
label: Router Paddle

prompt: A turbofan jet engine nacelle on a short display stand. A cylindrical outer nacelle encloses a central spinner and a front fan stage, with a rear exhaust cone aligned on the same axis. The fan rotor spins continuously about the engine centerline revolute axis inside the front intake.
label: Jet Engine Turbofan

prompt: A compact turbojet engine module with an intake lip, cylindrical core body, and conical exhaust nozzle. The core is supported by an outer casing and front struts, with a multi-blade compressor or fan visible at the intake. The visible rotor spins continuously on the main longitudinal revolute axis.
label: Jet Engine Turbojet

prompt: A compact mechanical keyboard. A rectangular case supports a grid of raised keycaps and a space bar row, with all keys arranged on a slightly recessed top plate. Each keycap is a small vertical prismatic slider with short travel normal to the case top.
label: Keyboard Compact

prompt: A full-size office keyboard with a main typing block and a numeric keypad. The housing is a broad shallow tray with stepped key rows, and each key sits in its own opening above the internal switch bed. The individual keys move as short prismatic plungers along vertical axes, with larger keys like the space bar and enter key following the same press direction.
label: Keyboard Full

prompt: A folding kick scooter with a narrow deck and upright handlebar stem. Two small wheels support the deck front and rear, and the stem rises from a front fork with a hinge block near the deck nose. Both wheels spin continuously on their axles, and the stem folds on a revolute hinge near the deck through about 170 degrees.
label: Kick Scooter Fold

prompt: A rigid commuter kick scooter with a long deck and T-bar handle. The front wheel sits in a fork connected to a steering column, and the rear wheel mounts at the tail under a small fender. The two wheels spin continuously on their axles, and the front fork steers about a vertical revolute axis through roughly +/-45 degrees.
label: Kick Scooter Rigid

prompt: A medical knee scooter with a padded knee platform and bicycle-style handlebar. A rectangular lower frame carries four small wheels, with the front pair in a steerable fork assembly and the rear pair on fixed axles, while the knee rest sits above the center frame. The four wheels spin continuously on their axles, and the front steering assembly yaws about a vertical revolute axis through roughly +/-45 degrees.
label: Knee Scooter Four Wheel

prompt: A compact knee walker with a front steering column and a height-adjustable knee pad platform. The chassis has two rear wheels on a straight axle and two front caster-like support wheels carried by the steering fork assembly. The wheels rotate continuously on their axles, and the front assembly steers on a vertical revolute axis with about +/-40 degrees of range.
label: Knee Scooter Compact

prompt: A thin laptop computer in the open clamshell form. A flat base contains the keyboard deck and a centered touchpad, and a thin display lid is attached along the rear edge by two compact hinges. The lid rotates on the rear revolute axis from closed to about 135 degrees open.
label: Laptop Thin

prompt: A rugged laptop with a thick base, reinforced corners, and a chunky display housing. The lower chassis and upper screen panel meet along a rear hinge spine, with the screen surrounded by a deep bezel. The clamshell hinge is a single effective rear revolute axis with about 0 to 150 degrees of motion.
label: Laptop Rugged

prompt: A round tabletop lazy Susan serving tray. A circular top platform sits above a slightly smaller base through a central bearing stack, leaving a small shadow gap between the two discs. The upper tray rotates continuously about the vertical center revolute axis relative to the base.
label: Lazy Susan Round

prompt: A two-tier pantry lazy Susan with a lower fixed base and one rotating shelf. The visible geometry is a broad circular tray above a low cylindrical support ring on a stable base plate. The tray spins continuously on a vertical revolute axis at the center.
label: Lazy Susan Pantry

prompt: A lighthouse lantern assembly with a cylindrical glass enclosure and a rotating beacon carriage inside. The lantern room sits on a tapered tower top, and a central vertical shaft supports the beacon frame with its lamp housing and reflector assembly. The beacon carriage rotates continuously about the vertical shaft axis inside the lantern room.
label: Lighthouse Beacon

prompt: A squat harbor lighthouse with a polygonal lantern room and exposed beacon mechanism. The upper lantern enclosure surrounds a central pedestal carrying a rotating light head, with a roof cap over the enclosure. The light head spins continuously on the central vertical revolute axis.
label: Lighthouse Harbor

category_title: Lounge chair with independent backrest and footrest
prompt: A reclining lounge chair with a fixed seat base, a hinged backrest, and a separate hinged footrest. The seat pan sits on a low support frame, the backrest is attached at the rear side pivots, and the footrest is attached at the front edge on its own linkage-free hinge. The backrest rotates about a transverse revolute axis through roughly 95 to 130 degrees seat-to-back angle, and the footrest rotates upward on a second transverse revolute axis through about 0 to 80 degrees.
label: Lounge Chair Simple

category_title: Lounge chair with independent backrest and footrest
prompt: A padded chaise-style recliner with broad side arms, a separate back panel, and a long footrest panel. The base frame is fixed, while the backrest is mounted between the side arms near the seat rear and the footrest is mounted near the seat front. The backrest pivots on a transverse revolute axis with about 35 degrees of recline, and the footrest pivots independently on its own transverse axis through about 70 degrees.
label: Lounge Chair Chaise

prompt: A rectangular louvered shutter panel. Two side stiles hold a stack of parallel slats, with each slat supported near its ends by pivot pins through the side rails. The slats are uncoupled revolute elements that each rotate about their long axis by roughly 0 to 90 degrees.
label: Shutter Panel

prompt: A plantation-style shutter with a rigid outer frame and several wide louvers. The frame is rectangular and the louvers span between the side members with visible end pivots, leaving small gaps between adjacent blades. Each louver rotates independently on a longitudinal revolute axis through about 80 degrees.
label: Shutter Plantation

prompt: A curbside mailbox with a rounded top and a front access door. The main box body is fixed to a short post or mounting plate, and the curved front door closes the mail opening with a small handle on its face. The front door rotates on a lower-edge revolute hinge axis by about 90 degrees.
label: Mailbox Curbside

prompt: A wall-mounted mailbox with a boxy housing and a front flap door. The rectangular body has a top overhang and a flat back panel for mounting, while the front door forms most of the front face. A bottom-edge revolute hinge lets the front door swing outward about 80 degrees.
label: Mailbox Wall

prompt: A countertop microwave oven with a side-hinged front door. A rectangular housing encloses the cooking cavity, and the door is a flat framed panel with a window mounted to one side of the opening. The door rotates on a vertical revolute hinge axis about 100 degrees.
label: Microwave Side Door

prompt: A compact microwave with a broad right-side control panel and a left-hinged glass-front door. The boxy body has softened front corners, and the door covers the cavity opening while a separate control column stays fixed. The door swings on a vertical revolute axis through about 90 degrees.
label: Microwave Compact

prompt: A pedestal-mounted missile launcher with a boxy launch pod. A fixed base supports a yaw turntable, which carries a tilting cradle with a rectangular missile canister pack mounted on top. The launcher yaws continuously about a vertical revolute axis at the base and pitches on a horizontal side revolute axis through about -10 to +60 degrees.
label: Missile Launcher Pod

prompt: A truck-bed style missile launcher module without the vehicle. A rectangular base frame carries a central slewing ring and an elevation arm that supports a bank of cylindrical launch tubes. The base rotates about a vertical revolute axis with full azimuth, and the tube bank elevates about a transverse revolute axis through about 0 to 70 degrees.
label: Missile Launcher Tubes

prompt: A bench miter saw arm assembly without the motor details over-emphasized. A flat base supports a rear pivot yoke, a swing arm, and a circular blade guard housing at the arm front. The arm rotates downward on a transverse revolute hinge at the rear pivot through about 0 to 55 degrees, and the table can yaw on a vertical center revolute axis through about +/-50 degrees.
label: Miter Saw Basic

prompt: A sliding compound miter saw assembly with twin horizontal rails. The base carries a turntable and fence, while the saw head rides on a carriage that slides fore-aft on the rails and also pivots downward from the rail carriage. The saw head pitches down on a transverse revolute axis through about 50 degrees, the carriage slides prismatically along the rail axis about 200 mm, and the turntable yaws on a vertical revolute axis about +/-45 degrees.
label: Miter Saw Sliding

prompt: A desktop computer motherboard. A flat rectangular PCB carries a large CPU socket, several long expansion slots, RAM slot banks, heatsink blocks, and rear I/O structures along one edge. The only articulated elements are a few socket retention arms and latches as small revolute levers mounted to their respective connectors with about 70 to 100 degrees of travel.
label: Motherboard ATX

prompt: A compact mini-ITX style motherboard with a dense central socket area and one main expansion slot. The board is a rigid flat plate populated by low heatsinks, slot walls, and edge connectors, with one CPU socket lever and one or two memory-slot latch tabs visible. The latch elements rotate on tiny revolute axes at the connector edges through short opening ranges.
label: Motherboard Mini

prompt: A ferris-wheel style observation wheel on an A-frame support. A large circular rim with spoke members is carried by side support towers, and small passenger gondolas hang from pivots around the rim. The main wheel rotates continuously about a horizontal central revolute axis, and each gondola hangs on its own transverse revolute pivot so it can stay roughly upright.
label: Observation Wheel Classic

prompt: A modern observation wheel with a broad hub, slender rim, and evenly spaced capsule cabins mounted outside the rim. The wheel is supported by two inclined legs and a central axle structure, with each capsule attached through a short hanger arm. The wheel spins on a central horizontal revolute axis, and each capsule pivots independently on its hanger revolute axis.
label: Observation Wheel Modern

prompt: A five-star office chair with casters, a central gas column, a seat, and a backrest. The wheeled base supports the seat through a central post, while the backrest is attached to the rear of the seat frame and the armrests are fixed to the seat sides. The five casters spin continuously on their wheel axles, and the backrest reclines on a transverse revolute joint near the seat rear through about 20 degrees.
label: Office Chair Task

prompt: A mesh-backed office chair with a five-wheel base and a simple tilt mechanism. The seat sits above a central pedestal, the back frame rises from the rear bracket, and paired armrests flank the seat. The caster wheels rotate continuously on their axles, and the seat-back assembly tilts about a transverse revolute axis through roughly 15 degrees.
label: Office Chair Mesh

prompt: A pair of over-ear headphones with a padded headband and two circular earcups. Each earcup is carried by a short yoke at the end of the headband arm, and the yoke includes a fold hinge near the cup mount. Each cup folds inward on a revolute hinge through about 90 degrees, and the cup can swivel slightly on a second local revolute axis within the yoke.
label: Headphones Fold

prompt: A DJ-style headphone set with thick earcups and broad fork yokes. The headband arches over the top and terminates in side forks, with each earcup suspended between fork arms and an extra fold joint above the cup. Each earcup rotates on its yoke axis through about +/-90 degrees for fit adjustment, and each side assembly folds inward on an additional revolute hinge about 100 degrees.
label: Headphones DJ

prompt: An overshot waterwheel on a simple support frame. A large spoked wheel with a ring of shallow buckets is mounted between two side supports, and a short chute above the wheel indicates where water would enter near the top. The wheel rotates continuously about its horizontal axle revolute axis.
label: Waterwheel Classic

prompt: A timber-framed mill waterwheel with a deep rim and evenly spaced paddles or buckets. The wheel is supported by an axle block on either side and sits partly above a trough base. One horizontal revolute axle allows continuous rotation of the wheel.
label: Waterwheel Mill

prompt: A classic padlock with a rectangular body and U-shaped shackle. The metal body houses the lower ends of the shackle, with one leg acting as the captive pivot side and the other as the releasing side. The shackle rotates upward on a revolute joint at the captive leg through about 60 degrees.
label: Padlock Classic

prompt: A discus-style padlock with a round shielded body and a partly exposed shackle. The circular body encloses most of the shackle span, leaving only the locking opening visible at the top. The shackle swings open on one anchored leg as a revolute joint with roughly 45 degrees of motion.
label: Padlock Discus

category_title: Palm with multiple uncoupled finger chains
prompt: A simplified robotic hand palm with four independent finger chains and a thumb. A rigid palm block supports five separate digit bases, and each digit is built from straight phalanx-like links connected in sequence. Every finger joint is a revolute hinge across the finger width; use three joints for each finger chain and two for the thumb, with about 0 to 90 degrees of flexion at each joint.
label: Robotic Hand Five Digit

category_title: Palm with multiple uncoupled finger chains
prompt: A mechanical palm plate with four uncoupled finger mechanisms for an anthropomorphic gripper. The palm is a broad base with finger root knuckles spaced along the front edge and a side-mounted thumb chain, and each digit is a stack of rigid link segments. Each chain uses serial revolute joints with transverse axes; the four fingers have three joints each and the thumb has two, all flexing through about 80 degrees independently.
label: Robotic Hand Plate

prompt: A desktop guillotine paper cutter. A flat rectangular cutting bed has a fence edge and a raised hinge block at one rear corner, with a long cutter arm spanning diagonally over the bed. The cutter arm rotates downward on a single rear-corner revolute hinge through about 0 to 80 degrees.
label: Paper Cutter Desktop

prompt: A heavy office paper cutter with a long straight blade arm and a rectangular base. The base carries a printed alignment bed and a fixed side fence, while the blade arm is attached near one corner through a robust pivot bracket. The arm swings on a revolute joint through about 90 degrees.
label: Paper Cutter Heavy

prompt: A satellite communication dish on a pedestal azimuth-elevation mount. A parabolic reflector sits on a rear support frame with a feed arm reaching to the dish center, and the reflector frame is attached to a yoke on top of a rotating pedestal. The pedestal yaws continuously about a vertical revolute axis, and the dish elevates on a horizontal side revolute axis through about 10 to 80 degrees.
label: Dish Pedestal

prompt: A ground-mounted tracking dish with a deep reflector and a rear truss-like support. The base is a short column with a turntable, and a side yoke carries the dish frame and feed horn assembly. The azimuth stage rotates about a vertical revolute axis with full sweep, and the elevation stage rotates about a transverse revolute axis through about 0 to 70 degrees.
label: Dish Tracker

prompt: A small pet door insert with a rectangular frame and a hinged flap. The outer frame mounts to a wall or door panel opening, and a thin flap panel hangs from the frame top edge. The flap swings on a horizontal upper revolute axis through roughly +/-45 degrees.
label: Pet Door Small

prompt: A larger insulated pet flap with a thick outer frame and a clear central door panel. The flap is supported near its upper corners by pivot pins inside the frame hood. The flap rotates on a horizontal top revolute axis with about 90 degrees total swing.
label: Pet Door Large

prompt: A pickup truck tailgate without the rest of the truck body. A wide rectangular tailgate panel fits between two short bed-side stubs, with hinge hardware at the bottom corners and a latch band along the top edge. The tailgate rotates downward on a lower transverse revolute axis through about 90 degrees.
label: Pickup Tailgate Basic

prompt: A modern pickup tailgate with a stamped outer panel and an inner framed surface. The panel is attached between simplified bed-side supports and has a broad top cap and side latch points. A bottom-edge revolute hinge lets the tailgate fold from vertical closed to horizontal open.
label: Pickup Tailgate Modern

prompt: A warehouse platform cart with a flat deck and four caster wheels. The rectangular deck sits low between corner caster mounts, and a push handle rises from one short end. Each caster wheel rotates continuously on its axle, and the front caster forks swivel about vertical revolute axes.
label: Platform Cart Warehouse

prompt: A fold-handle platform trolley with a steel deck and four small wheels. The rear handle is attached to the deck by two side hinges so it can fold flat, while the four caster assemblies sit near the corners underneath. The handle folds on two aligned revolute joints through about 90 degrees, the wheels spin continuously on their axles, and the caster forks swivel about vertical axes.
label: Platform Cart Fold

prompt: A single-seat playground swing on an A-frame support. Two side frames and a top crossbeam support a flat seat suspended by two rigid hanger links or simplified rods. The seat hangs from two top revolute joints and swings in a vertical plane through about +/-45 degrees.
label: Playground Swing Seat

prompt: A tire-style playground swing suspended from a gantry frame. A horizontal top beam spans between side supports, and a circular tire seat hangs below on three evenly spaced rigid link hangers meeting at the top support points. Each hanger uses a top revolute support, allowing the tire assembly to swing as a pendulum with about +/-35 degrees motion.
label: Playground Swing Tire

prompt: A soap dispenser pump bottle. A cylindrical bottle body supports a threaded neck with a pump collar, a vertical plunger stem, and a short spout head at the top. The plunger moves as a vertical prismatic slider with short downward travel, and the spout head may rotate continuously about the stem axis.
label: Pump Bottle Soap

prompt: A lotion pump bottle with a square-shouldered container and a broad pump head. The bottle body is fixed, while the pump assembly at the neck includes a telescoping plunger and a nozzle head on top. The plunger is a short axial prismatic joint into the collar, and the nozzle head rotates about the vertical stem axis.
label: Pump Bottle Lotion

prompt: A wall-mounted kitchen range hood with a tapered canopy and a front control strip. The main hood body is a tapered cover over a rectangular intake canopy, with two or three rotary control knobs spaced across the front panel. Each knob rotates continuously about its own front-to-back revolute axis.
label: Range Hood Knobs

prompt: A chimney-style kitchen range hood with a lower intake canopy and a tall upper chimney cover. A slim front control panel carries several push-buttons arranged in a row across the front face. Each button is a short prismatic plunger that moves normal to the panel with brief travel into the housing.
label: Range Hood Buttons

prompt: A top-freezer refrigerator with separate upper and lower doors. A tall rectangular cabinet body supports a smaller freezer door above and a larger fresh-food door below, each mounted on one side. The two doors rotate on parallel vertical revolute hinge axes and each opens about 110 degrees.
label: Fridge Top Freezer

prompt: A side-by-side refrigerator with two full-height doors. A wide cabinet body is split down the center, with a left and right door meeting at the middle seam and simple recessed handles on the outer edges. Each door swings on its own vertical revolute hinge axis through about 100 degrees.
label: Fridge Side By Side

prompt: A compact remote weapon station on a low pedestal. A rotating base supports an elevation cradle with a boxy sensor unit on one side and a machine-gun-like barrel assembly on the other, all protected by armored side plates. The base yaws continuously about a vertical revolute axis, and the weapon cradle pitches on a horizontal side axis through about -20 to +60 degrees.
label: RWS Compact

prompt: A heavier remote weapon station with a central slewing ring, shield plates, and a launcher or gun mounted in an elevated cradle. The pedestal carries the yaw stage, while the upper frame supports the weapon and sensor package between two side cheeks. The system rotates on a vertical revolute azimuth axis and pitches on a transverse revolute elevation axis through roughly -10 to +70 degrees.
label: RWS Heavy

prompt: A box cutter style retractable utility knife. A tapered handle shell contains a straight blade slider that emerges from the front nose, with a thumb button riding in a top slot. The blade carrier is a prismatic slider along the handle centerline with about 40 mm of travel.
label: Utility Knife Slider

prompt: A chunky snap-off utility knife with a segmented blade and top thumb slider. The outer body is a rectangular shell with a tapered nose, and the internal blade carrier aligns to a straight channel through the housing. The blade carrier translates prismatically along the long axis through several discrete extension positions over about 50 mm total travel.
label: Utility Knife Snapoff

prompt: A studio ring light mounted on a tripod stand. A circular light ring is carried by a small tilt bracket at the top of a vertical telescoping stand, and the stand is supported by three fold-out legs. The light ring tilts on a horizontal revolute axis through about +/-60 degrees, the center stand column extends prismatically upward about 300 mm, and each tripod leg folds on a revolute hinge at the hub.
label: Ring Light Tripod

prompt: A desktop ring light on a compact stand with a weighted base. The circular light head is attached to a short yoke on top of a telescoping mast rising from the base. The head tilts on a horizontal revolute axis through about +/-45 degrees, and the mast extends prismatically along the vertical axis by about 150 mm.
label: Ring Light Desktop
